seo.defaultTitle: Optim | Creativity that captures. Calculation that converts.
seo.defaultDescription: Optim builds strategic marketing systems powered by creativity that captures and calculation that converts: strategy, content, paid media, branding, web and CRM aligned for growth.

home.title: Optim | Strategic marketing agency
home.description: Optim home page: strategy, creativity, performance media, branding, web and CRM connected in one growth system.

about.title: About Optim | Strategy, clarity and execution
about.description: Learn about Optim's philosophy, method and business branches for brands that need commercial structure.

services.title: Services | What we do and how we do it
services.description: Strategic marketing, content, paid media, branding, web and CRM services explained through a business lens.

pricing.title: Pricing | Packages and operating models
pricing.description: Explore Optim's base plans and pricing for strategy, content, performance and commercial systems.

contact.title: Contact | Book a diagnostic with Optim
contact.description: Form, map, phone numbers and social links to get in touch with Optim and start a strategic diagnostic.

hero.headline: Your brand deserves more than likes.
hero.subheadline: Scroll-stopping creativity + sales-closing strategy. Everything connected in one system.

slides.title: We make them stop scrolling.
slides.description: Premium content that positions your brand and makes it impossible to ignore.

slides.title: Every dollar spent, tracked.
slides.description: Data, optimization and discipline to turn attention into real sales.

slides.title: From idea to CRM. No gaps.
slides.description: Strategy, content, ads, web and follow-up connected as one engine.

pillars.title: Creativity + Strategy. One without the other fails.
pillars.description: Pretty without strategy just entertains. Numbers without narrative bore. We merge both forces to move business.

items.title: Creativity that captures
items.description: Concepts and assets that feel native, get shared organically and elevate your brand perception.

items.title: Calculation that converts
items.description: Clear hypotheses, real metrics and constant optimization. Zero vanity metrics.

servicesPreview.title: A marketing system, not a list of deliverables.

process.title: 5 steps. From winging it to a growth machine.

steps.title: Diagnostic
steps.description: X-ray of your business: where you are, what's broken and where the opportunity lives.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: Messaging, channels and clear priorities. A map before we execute.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: Content, assets and experiences with commercial intent. Nothing decorative.

steps.title: Distribution
steps.description: Organic + paid. Right message, right audience, right moment.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.description: We iterate on real data. Adjust, scale and double down on what works.

items.name: Optim MKT Digital
items.description: Growth for brands that need clarity, content and performance under one logic.

items.name: Optim MKT Inmobiliario
items.description: Qualified leads for developers, brokers and real estate firms. From click to close.

items.name: Optim Creator Studios
items.description: Positioning and monetization for creators ready to operate as a brand.

items.name: Optim Productions
items.description: Premium audiovisual production: campaigns, commercials and high-impact brand assets.

companies.title: Real results. Not promises.
companies.description: Success stories, real industries and metrics that speak for themselves.

items.name: Mónica Martínez
items.description: They take care of EVERYTHING. I went from 4k to over 10k followers with millions of views. They don't just execute; they think through every detail to take my project to the next level.

items.name: Punta del Huajuco
items.description: We achieved 1M+ reach and 300 qualified leads. They gave us total control over our sales without relying on external agencies or sharing commissions.

items.name: QRUSH
items.description: They built our brand from scratch with a brutal strategy and creative direction. Everything feels aligned, professional, and ready to compete from day one.

closing.title: Stop winging it. Start scaling.
closing.description: Book a free diagnostic. We identify your critical gaps and design the system your business needs.

worksSlider.headline: Our Works
worksSlider.title: What we build for our clients

hero.title: We connect perception with results. Period.
hero.description: Creative direction + strategic thinking + commercial ops. Brands that look great and sell better.

story.title: Why we exist
story.description: We saw the same problem over and over: talented brands with fragmented execution. Optim was born to connect the dots — solid branding, performing media and zero lost leads.

items.title: Clarity > Volume
items.description: Less noise, more impact. Precise messaging and grounded decisions.

items.title: System > Improvisation
items.description: Every piece connects to a structure that sustains and scales it.

items.title: Aesthetics with purpose
items.description: If it doesn't strengthen perception or conversion, it doesn't belong.

aboutPage.teamNote: One strategic cell: strategy, creativity, production, media and automation. One team, one vision.

hero.title: What we do. No fluff.
hero.description: Perception, acquisition and follow-up in one system. Every service has a clear role in growing your business.

intro.title: We don't sell loose pieces.
intro.description: Each service works standalone, but they perform twice as well when integrated. The goal: a growth system where everything connects.

services.title: Marketing Strategy
services.summary: The map before the action. Think first, execute second.
how: Roadmap with KPIs and operating rhythm.

how: Assembling specialized crews and talent (directors, crew, audio, etc.).
Optimized execution based on the project's quality level and scope.

method.title: How we operate
items: First, we listen to your business.
We iterate on data, not assumptions.

hero.title: Clear packages for different levels of need.
hero.description: Base pricing to help you evaluate the level of system you need. Every final proposal adjusts to scope, volume and industry.

plans.name: Base
plans.description: For brands that need to organize messaging, presence and a first acquisition structure.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For businesses already selling and ready for a more serious content, media and follow-up system.
features: Meta Ads and Google Ads management

plans.name: Scale
plans.description: For brands or developments that need integral operation, speed and higher iteration capacity.

custom.title: Need a custom proposal?
custom.description: We also take project-based work: branding, sites, launch campaigns, audiovisual production or focused CRM implementation.

pricingPage.note: Prices in MXN. Ad spend and advanced third-party production costs are not included.
